filterDialog.title: Frame Filters
filterDialog.frameIdsHelp: Frames with matching IDs will be moved to the Filtered tab. Supports comma-separated values and ranges (e.g., 0x100-0x109, 0x151).
filterDialog.minLengthHelp: Frames shorter than this will be filtered out and shown in the Filtered tab. Set to 0 to disable length filtering.
